item.name: Goggle-eyed Dogu
item.description:
Guaranteed to win any staring contest.

Use item to acquire the goggle-eyed dogu minion.
item.tooltip:
Who would have thought that the
answer to our prayers would be
found in ancient pottery of all places?
   - Zlatan
item.specialactiondescription:
Renders ally Gates, Shield, and Search Eyeimpervious to damage.
Duration: 20s
